name: CLX - MGA Insurance Application Final Review v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Session-token auth (advisor / mga_principal / supervisor / admin). Advisor approves a built application. Sets advisor_review_status='approved' + locked=true, then synchronously triggers compliance agent (A1.1 review_type=final_compliance). Compliance agent decision drives next: approved → submission_status='submitted' (Phase 6 carrier-API submit); requires_human_review → routed to compliance_officer queue; rejected → notify advisor + unlock for revision.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ advisor_review_status: 'approved', advisor_review_notes: $json.advisor_review_notes, advisor_reviewed_at: new Date().toISOString(), locked: true, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, review_type: 'final_compliance', policy_application_id: $json.application.id, client_id: $json.application.client_id, advisor_id: $json.application.advisor_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: $('Decide Next State').item.json.ai_decision === 'approved' ? 'application_submitted' : 'application_review_complete', client_id: $('Decide Next State').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Decide Next State').item.json.advisor_id, policy_application_id: $('Decide Next State').item.json.application_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Carry Application').item.json.user_id, performed_by_role: $('Carry Application').item.json.user_role, event_data: { ai_decision: $('Decide Next State').item.json.ai_decision, needs_human: $('Decide Next State').item.json.needs_human, new_submission_status: $('Decide Next State').item.json.patch.submission_status }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', application_id: $('Decide Next State').item.json.application_id, ai_decision: $('Decide Next State').item.json.ai_decision, submission_status: $('Decide Next State').item.json.patch.submission_status, needs_human: $('Decide Next State').item.json.needs_human }) }}
